changes.before: The first she had felt that was not stolen from a galley stove or another body standing too close.
changes.after: The first true heat since the galley stove and bodies pressed close.

changes.before: Not one thing. A repeating breath.
changes.after: A repeating breath.

changes.before: Fire would not break it. Fire changed things from the inside.
changes.after: Fire changed things from the inside.

changes.before: Not a break point. The turn.
changes.after: The turn.

changes.before: Not to melt it. To force the binding to answer to something else.
changes.after: To change the binding from the inside.

changes.before: Not an insult. Ship measure.
changes.after: Ship measure.

changes.before: Short this time. As though the trouble were discipline and not the bakery smell rising off her skin.
changes.after: Short this time. As though the bakery smell rising off her skin were the trouble.

changes.before: He was no longer arriving. He was settled.
changes.after: Long enough to settle his guard and routines.

changes.before: Not this.
changes.after: Routine trouble.

changes.before: Baelgun's eyes went over them once: elf commander, half-spent mage, Cyndia with her bow still in hand, three rangers crusted in cave frost and old blood.
changes.after: Baelgun took them in once: elf commander, half-spent mage, Cyndia with her bow still in hand, three rangers crusted in cave frost and old blood.

changes.before: Then the wind got under her hood and reminded her what waited farther south.
changes.after: Then the wind got under her hood, and she remembered what waited farther south.

changes.before: The pause where the whole thing changed its mind.
changes.after: The pause where the rhythm turned.

changes.before: That lie had not survived Northrend.
changes.after: By Northrend, the lie was dead.

changes.before: When the pull in Frostmourne's field lined up cleanly with the rhythm of her steps, the answer opened one shade farther.
changes.after: When the pull in Frostmourne's field lined up cleanly with the rhythm of her steps, Jaina understood one shade more.

changes.before: Dagny's eyes slid to Sylvanas.
changes.after: Dagny turned to Sylvanas.

changes.before: "Come fast," Antonidas said. "That is all the city will still allow you."
changes.after: "Come fast," Antonidas said. "That is all they'll still permit."

changes.before: The sea offered no answer.
changes.after: She found no answer in the sea.

changes.before: That was the only kindness the crossing gave her.
changes.after: That was the only good thing she got from the crossing.

changes.before: The moment she stopped feeding the sails, the body keeping count under everything else presented its bill.
changes.after: The moment she stopped feeding the sails, the spent strength hit all at once.

changes.before: Dragonblight had at least possessed the decency to announce itself as murder-country.
changes.after: From the first mile, Dragonblight had been murder-country.

changes.before: Silence sat badly in the mouth.
changes.after: Keeping silent sat badly in her mouth.

changes.before: "The court hears only what confirms the prince's return as triumph."
changes.after: "Only confirming reports reach the courtiers still calling it triumph."

changes.before: Antonidas's eyes shifted a fraction, hearing the older wound under the new question.
changes.after: Antonidas turned a fraction, hearing the older wound under the new question.

changes.before: The ordinary machinery of a palace breathing on the far side of murder.
changes.after: Beyond the court, kitchen work went on.

changes.before: The service passage swallowed them whole.
changes.after: They vanished into the service passage.

changes.before: The blood ran bright for a moment, then went black where the salt dried it into the grain of the wood.
changes.after: The blood ran bright, then went black where the salt dried it into the grain of the wood.

changes.before: Warm country was harder on Sylvanas than the cold had been.
changes.after: Warm damp sat wrong on Sylvanas.

changes.before: The mage had stopped treating care as interruption.
changes.after: That settled it for Sylvanas.

changes.before: Antonidas looked at her then, and fear slipped past the archmage for a beat before work buried it again.
changes.after: Antonidas turned to her then, and fear showed plain on his face before he buried it in work again.

changes.before: It shut with the sound of the last help in the kingdom staying outside.
changes.after: [deleted]

changes.before: The body handled it. The temper did not.
changes.after: It slicked the reins, plastered cloth to skin, and sharpened her temper with every mile.

changes.before: He was no longer arriving. He was settled.
changes.after: Long enough to settle his guard and routines.

changes.before: They were living with the truth available to them, which was a worse innocence than stupidity.
changes.after: They were cheering the story they'd been given.

changes.before: No cruelty in it. Mere fact.
changes.after: [deleted]

changes.before: It shut with the sound of the last help in the kingdom staying outside.
changes.after: [deleted]

changes.before: the body keeping count under everything else presented its bill.
changes.after: the spent strength hit all at once.

changes.before: the truth available to them, which was a worse innocence than stupidity.
changes.after: They were cheering the story they'd been given.

changes.before: What showed instead was a man hearing the price attached to one particular body.
changes.after: What showed instead was fear at the thought of Sylvanas in Frostmourne's reach.

changes.before: The ordinary machinery of a palace breathing on the far side of murder.
changes.after: Beyond the court, kitchen work went on.
